assignments.description: Follow Up Labs Review - Needs Quote Task Assignment
assignments.name: Follow_Up_Labs_Review_Needs_Quote_Task_Assignment
assignments.label: Follow Up Labs Review - Needs Quote Task Assignment

constants.description:
We use this as baseline for weeks calculation.. i.e. used to decide how many reminder tasks we need to create on Opportunity Level
Max number of weeks - const_txt_weekOffsetRepeititveEngagement / const_txt_weekDurationRepeititveEngagement 12 > 12-8 = 4 / 4 = 1 13 > 13-8 = 5 / 4 = 1 14 > 14-8 = 6 / 4 = 1 15 > 15-8 = 7 / 4 = 1 - Reminder task 1 16 > 16-8 = 8 / 4 = 2 17 > 17-8 = 9 / 4 = 2 18 > 18-8 = 10 / 4 = 2 19 > 19-8 = 11 / 4 = 2 20 > 20-8 = 12 / 4 = 3 21 > 21-8 = 13 / 4 = 3 22 > 22-8 = 14 / 4 = 3 - 3 Tasks 23 > 23-8 = 15 / 4 = 3 24 > 24-8 = 16 / 4 = 4 25 > 25-8 = 17 / 4 = 4 26 > 26-8 = 18 / 4 = 4
constants.name: const_Offset_12_Weeks

decisions.name: Check_Week_Duration_Reminder_for_Medications
decisions.label: Check Week Duration - Reminder for Medications

Flow.description: Automated task creation based on predefined triggers and timelines

formulas.description: The task called "Lab work reminder" should be generated 6 months after "10-week-lab reminder" Tasks
formulas.name: form_10week_labReminder_add_6_months
form_ActivityDate_4_Business_Days
formulas.expression: CASE( WEEKDAY({!$Record.Approved_Date__c}), 2, {!$Record.Approved_Date__c} + 4, /* Monday */ 7, {!$Record.Approved_Date__c} + 5, /* Saturday */ 1, {!$Record.Approved_Date__c} + 4, /* Sunday */ {!$Record.Approved_Date__c} + 6 /* Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday */ )

formulas.name: form_MonthlyReminderDate
formulas.expression: DATE( YEAR({!form_ActivityDate_45_Days}) + FLOOR((MONTH({!form_ActivityDate_45_Days}) + {!num_LoopCounter}) / 13), MOD(MONTH({!form_ActivityDate_45_Days}) + {!num_LoopCounter} - 1, 12) + 1, MIN( DAY({!form_ActivityDate_45_Days}), CASE( MOD(MONTH({!form_ActivityDate_45_Days}) + {!num_LoopCounter} - 1, 12) + 1, 2, 28, 4, 30, 6, 30, 9, 30, 11, 30, 31 ) ) )

Flow.interviewLabel: Record Trigger - Opportunity - Sales Task Automation {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Record Trigger - Opportunity - Sales Task Automation

loops.description: Create Reminder Tasks As Per Repetitive Counter
loops.name: Create_Reminder_Tasks_As_Per_Repetitive_Counter
loops.label: Create Reminder Tasks As Per Repetitive Counter
